# seerr_notification_webhook (Data Source)

Read Seerr webhook notification settings via /api/v1/settings/notifications/webhook.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `embed_poster` (Boolean)
- `enabled` (Boolean)
- `notification_types` (Set of String)
- `webhook` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--webhook))

<a id="nestedatt--webhook"></a>
### Nested Schema for `webhook`

Read-Only:

- `auth_header` (String, Sensitive)
- `json_payload` (String)
- `webhook_url` (String)
